name: devflow-marketplace
description: Local marketplace for the vendored DevFlow plugin (.devflow/vendor/devflow). Installed by devflow-autopilot/install.sh.

plugins.name: devflow
plugins.description: End-to-end dev workflow: /devflow:implement, /devflow:review + /devflow:review-and-fix, the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the retrospective loop.
